themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties across Europe are advancing 'national priority' policies, which prioritize citizens over immigrants in access to social services, housing, and welfare. This theme appears in Spain, Italy, and France, with Vox, Lega, and Rassemblement National leading the charge in their respective countries.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Proposes replacing historical memory laws with 'Concord' framework and prioritizing nationals in Andalusia's elections.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Advocates for policies that prioritize Italian citizens in social services and housing.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Jordan Bardella pushes for welfare reforms that prioritize French citizens over immigrants.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Demands verifiable residency for public aid access, excluding irregular migrants.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Criticizes state spending on foreign aid, questioning the necessity of funding Gaza's water network.

Vox lleva prioridad nacional a todos los Parlamentos y exige arraigo "verificable" para ayudas

themes.title: Trump’s Iran war dominates global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Right-wing media in the U.S., Italy, Poland, Hungary, and the UK are intensely focused on Trump's military actions against Iran, framing it as a pivotal moment for global security. The coverage often highlights divisions within the right over the war's justification and outcomes.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: MAGA influencers turn against Trump over Iran war, calling it a betrayal of his base.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni distances Italy from Trump's Iran policies, emphasizing NATO commitments.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Covers Trump's Iran strategy and its implications for Poland's security.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Criticizes Trump's erratic goals in the Iran conflict, questioning U.S. involvement.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Jordan Bardella warns Europe faces growing threats from the Iran conflict.

themes.title: Meloni’s government longevity sparks cross-national debate
themes.blurb: Giorgia Meloni's long tenure as Italy's Prime Minister has sparked debates across Europe about the stability and effectiveness of right-wing governments. This theme is particularly prominent in Italy, Germany, France, Poland, and Hungary, where leaders and analysts assess her impact on domestic and EU policies.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni's government faces scrutiny over its longevity and policy achievements.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: Debates Meloni's influence on European far-right movements and policies.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Compares Meloni's leadership style with Jordan Bardella's approach to governance.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Analyzes Meloni's government as a model for conservative leadership in Europe.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Critiques Meloni's policies in the context of Hungary's political landscape.

themes.title: Far-right surges in European polls and elections
themes.blurb: Far-right parties are gaining significant traction in polls and elections across Europe, with notable surges in Germany, France, Sweden, Norway, and the UK. This theme highlights the growing influence of parties like AfD, RN, Sverigedemokraterna, and Reform UK in shaping national agendas.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD leads in polls, challenging traditional parties in Germany.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Jordan Bardella and Marine Le Pen lead in French polls ahead of the 2027 presidential election.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: SD manipulates Sweden's voting system to secure key policy victories.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: FrP gains ground in Norway, threatening traditional parties in local elections.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK challenges Labour in UK local elections, gaining support in Scotland and Wales.

themes.title: Corruption scandals rock far-right governments
themes.blurb: Corruption allegations are undermining far-right governments in Argentina and Spain, with high-profile figures like Manuel Adorni and Vox officials facing scrutiny. This theme highlights how scandals are eroding public trust and destabilizing political alliances.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Manuel Adorni faces investigation for alleged illicit enrichment and cash payments for home renovations.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox officials accused of misusing public funds and engaging in corrupt practices.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Javier Milei's government faces criticism over Adorni's scandals and economic policies.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox's internal conflicts and corruption allegations threaten its electoral prospects.
